notes.tracking_error_max_m: Fixed above the M1 safe X500/SIH anchors (about 2.35 m max for the 5 Hz sine and about 2.46 m for the too-hard heavy case) but below the 10 m step infrastructure-failsafe case (about 7.87 m).
notes.tracking_error_rms_m: Fixed above the M1 safe anchors (about 1.45 m RMS for the 5 Hz sine and 0.59 m for the heavy step) while still flagging sustained loss of task tracking.
notes.final_error_m: Mission completion bound for small M2 setpoint amplitudes; M1 safe anchors finished below 0.7 m.
notes.roll_pitch_max_deg: Divergence/flip guard, aligned with the M1 envelope and below near-inversion.
notes.angular_rate_max_rad_s: Divergence guard, aligned with the M1 envelope and far above M1 safe anchors below about 1.1 rad/s.
notes.motor_saturation_ratio_max: Only flags nearly continuous saturation; saturation remains primarily a fitness signal below this limit.
notes.min_altitude_agl_m: Ground-contact guard used in M1; X500 hover target is 2.5 m AGL.
